title: Hunting: AD Attack Timeline - Multi-Stage Credential Attack Chain
description: Correlates credential attack stages across Windows Security Events: failed logons (4625), explicit creds (4648), privilege escalation (4672 with SeDebug), Kerberos TGS (4769), directory replication (4662), and credential reads (5379). Identifies hosts exhibiting 3+ stages indicating an active attack chain.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' in ('4625', '4648', '4672', '4769', '4662', '5379') | stats count as TotalEvents, distinctcount('Event ID') as UniqueEventTypes by Entity | where UniqueEventTypes >= 3 | sort -TotalEvents
